name: frc-programming
title: FRC Programming
description: An all-in-one Raycast extension for FRC developers to instantly access WPILib docs and handle frequent unit conversions.
author: helloGithub326

commands.name: wpilib-java-documentation
commands.title: Search WPILib Java Documentation
commands.description: Search and browse WPILib's Java API classes and methods.

commands.name: wpilib-cpp-documentation
commands.title: Search WPILib C++ Documentation
commands.description: Search and browse WPILib's C++ API classes.

commands.name: status-light-reference
commands.title: FRC Status Light Reference
commands.description: Quickly jump to WPILib's reference page for decoding status light patterns on FRC hardware.

commands.name: frc-unit-converter
commands.title: FRC Unit Converter
commands.description: Convert between common FRC units like velocities or forces.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
